message:
fix(codegen): Escape keyword module names in import paths and fix parameter shadowing

- Add writeEscapedImportPath helper to escape last segment of import paths
  (e.g., runtime.Lib.enum -> runtime.Lib.@"enum")
- Apply escaping at 3 locations in generator.zig for import path emission
- Add module_level_from_imports check to parameter shadowing detection
  (fixes 'deque' param shadowing 'from collections import deque')
- Add Python enum module compatibility exports:
  EnumMeta, EnumType, ReprEnum, STRICT/CONFORM/EJECT/KEEP,
  verify, member, nonmember, _simple_enum, _iter_bits_lsb
